productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Jamaica Lifestyle Black Messenger Bag
description: High on style, this black messenger bag is perfect for carrying on as cabin baggage or for daily use. With super strong webbing straps and re-enforced seams giving it a heavy-duty look, the style of this bag is enhanced by the faded out urban print on the front pocket. The Jamaican inspired colours on the strap and zippers will give you an added edge of cool &ndash fill the bag with your Bob Marley vinyl records. Height: 37cm Width: 30cm Depth: 14cm Made of PU for durability and smooth leather effect Adjustable webbing shoulder strap One large main compartment with internal zip pocket big enough to carry your travel documents and two internal open pockets One medium zipped pocket on the front with gold and white print, and fabric patch decoration on front surface Chunky metal zip tags with puma logo Care Wipe clean with a damp cloth when required Do not use detergent
